case.title: The user should be able to open the "Web3 companies and Jobs Page" by clicking the "Web3 companies and Jobs" link.
CEO quote text should be displayed on the Main Page.
The "Main Page" should contain a section describing the key benefits of the platform for recruiters.
The comparison section should show hiring statistics compared with other hiring methods.
The logos of partners should be displayed on the Main Page.
CTA section should contain benefits list of using the platform for companies.
The user should be redirected to the "Sign up" form by clicking the [Free sign up] button in the page header.
The "Main Page for Engineers" should be displayed as the default landing page for logged-out users.
The "Main Page for Engineers" should be displayed as the default landing page for logged-in recruiters.
The "Main Page for Engineers" should be displayed as the default landing page for logged-in candidates.
The form for registration by email should be displayed on the "Main Page For engineers".
[Sign in with Google] button should be displayed on the "Main Page For engineers".
The user should be redirected to the Google authentication page by clicking on [Sign in with Google] button.
The user should be redirected to the LinkedIn authentication page by clicking on [Sign in with LinkedIn] button.
[Sign in with LinkedIn] button should be displayed on the "Main Page For engineers".
The user should be redirected to the GitHub authentication page by clicking on [Sign in with GitHub] button.
[Sign in with GitHub] button should be displayed on the "Main Page For engineers".
10 review cards with feedback from real users should be displayed at the bottom of the "Main Page for Engineers".
The "Sign Up" form should not be displayed for logged-in users on the "Main Page".
The logged-in users should see a mobile app advertisement banner on the main page.
The logged-out user should not be able to use filters.
The logged-out user should be redirected to the "Sign up" form by clicking on [Free sign up] button.
The logged-out user should be redirected to the "Sign in" form by clicking on [Sign in] button.
Recruiter should be able to filter candidates by role.
Recruiter should be able to filter candidates by skills.
Recruiter should be able to filter candidates by desired salary.
Recruiter should be able to filter candidates by English level.
Recruiter should be able to filter candidates by location.
Recruiter should be able to clear filters of the "Candidate list" by clicking on [Clear filter] button.
Recruiter should be able to take a look to a list of cards with info about a candidate on the "Candidate list".
Candidate's skills and achievements should be displayed in the candidate's card.
Candidate profile should open in a new tab after clicking on the candidate card.
Candidate role should be displayed on the candidate`s card.
Candidate contacts should be hidden before starting a chat with the candidate.
Candidate experience should be displayed from the oldest to the newest positions.
The recruiter should not be able to see the candidate's contact information before starting a chat.
Recruiter should be able to start a chat with a candidate by clicking [Start chat] button.
The logged-in user should be able to see all candidate’s experiences by clicking on "Show experience" button.
The recruiter should be able to initiate a chat with a candidate on the candidate profile page by clicking on [Send message] button.
Candidate should be able to filter candidates by role.
Candidate should be able to filter candidates by skills.
Candidate should be able to filter candidates by desired salary.
Candidate should be able to filter candidates by location.
Candidate should be able to filter candidates by English level.
Candidate should be able to take a look to a list of cards with info about a candidate on the "Candidate list".
Candidate should see a warning that a recruiter profile is required to start a chat with candidates.
The recruiter should be able to initiate a chat with a candidate on the list of candidates by clicking on [Start chat] button.
The logged-out user should be able to sign in by filling in the required fields of the " Sign In" form with valid data and clicking on [Sign In] button.
The user should not be able to sign in with an empty "Email" field.
The user should not be able to sign in with an empty "Password" field.
The logged-out user should be redirected to the "Forgot Password" Page by clicking the "Forgot password" link.
The user should be redirected to the Google authentication page by clicking on [Sign in with Google] button.
The user should be redirected to the LinkedIn authentication page by clicking on [Sign in with LinkedIn] button.
The user should be redirected to the GitHub authentication page by clicking on [Sign in with GitHub] button.
The logged-out user should be redirected to the "Sign Up" Page by clicking the "Sign Up" link.
The user should be redirected to the role selection stage after filling in all required fields of the "Sign Up" form and clicking [Create account] button.
The user should be able to select a candidate role for registration after filling on all required fields of the "Sign up" form and clicking on [Create account] button.
The user should be able to select a recruiter role for registration after filling on all required fields of the "Sign up" form and clicking on [Create account] button.
The user should not be able to continue registration with an empty "Email" field.
The user should not be able to continue registration with an empty "Password" field.
The user should be able to show and hide the password using the "Show/Hide password" toggle.
The user should not be able to continue registration with an empty "Repeat password" field.
The user should be able to show and hide the password using the "Show/Hide password" toggle.
[Sign up with Google] button should be displayed on the "Sign Up" Page.
The user should be redirected to the Google authentication page by clicking on [Sign up with Google] button.
[Sign up with LinkedIn] button should be displayed on the "Sign Up" Page.
The user should be redirected to the LinkedIn authentication page by clicking on [Sign up with LinkedIn] button.
[Sign up with GitHub] button should be displayed on the "Sign Up" Page.
The user should be redirected to the GitHub authentication page by clicking on [Sign up with GitHub] button.
The user should be redirected to the "Sign In" Page by clicking on the "Sign In" link.
The user should be redirected to the first step of registration as a candidate by clicking on the candidate role option.
The user should be redirected to the first step of registration as a recruiter by clicking on the recruiter role option.
Candidate registration flow should contain 5 stages: role,expectations,experience,bio,contact information.
The user should not be able to continue registration with an empty "Desired position" field.
The user should not be able to continue registration with a list of 4 skills in the "Core technical skills" field.
The user should be able to continue registration with a list of 5 skills in the "Core technical skills" field.
The user should be able to continue registration with a list of 6 skills in the "Core technical skills" field.
The user should be able to continue registration with a list of 14 skills in the "Core technical skills" field.
The user should be able to continue registration with a list of 15 skills in the "Core technical skills" field.
The user should not be able to continue registration with a list of 16 skills in the "Core technical skills" field.
The user should be able to specify the desired salary in dollars in the "Desired salary" field.
The user should be able to specify the desired salary in euro in the "Desired salary" field.
The user should be able to enter the desired salary per year by selecting the "Annual" option in the salary period toggle.
The user should be able to enter the desired monthly salary by selecting the "Monthly" option in the salary period toggle.
The user should not be able to continue the registration with an empty "Desired salary" field.
The user should not be able to continue the registration if no job experience is celected.
The user should not be able to continue the registration if the English level is not selected.
The user should be able to enter the location in the "Your location" field.
The user should be able to enter information about experience manually by clicking on [Add manually] button.
The user should not be able to continue registration with an empty "Company name" field.
The user should be able to take a look at well-filled profile examples by clicking on "Frontend Engineer" link.
The user should be able to take a look at well-filled profile examples by clicking on "Mobile Engineer" link.
The user should be able to take a look at well-filled profile examples by clicking on "Backend Engineer" link.
The user should be able to choose free NFT avatar from the NFT list.
The user should not be able to activate profile with an empty "First Name" field.
The user should not be able to activate profile with an empty "Last Name" field.
The user should be able to attach CV by clicking on [Attach CV] button.
The user should not be able to proceed with recruiter registration if the "My role" field is empty.
The user should be able to enter a company name in the "Company" field during recruiter registration.
The recruiter should be able to enter the contact information during the registration process.
The user should be able to upload a photo by clicking on [Avatar upload] button.
The user should not be able to continue registration with an empty "First name" field.
The user should be able to enter the last name in the "Last name" field.
The recruiter should be able to select the candidate role using the "Role" selector during the registration process.
The recruiter should be able to enter required technologies for a candidate in the "Technologies" field during the registration process.
The recruiter should be able to filter candidates by their annual salary expectations during the registration process.
The recruiter should be able to filter candidates by their monthly salary expectations during the registration process.
The recruiter should be able to enter the candidate’s years of experience in the "Job experience" selector during the registration process.
The recruiter should be able to enter the candidate’s English level in the "English level" selector during the registration process.
The recruiter should be able to enter the candidate’s country/city in the "Select city or country" field during the registration process.
The recruiter should be redirected to "Candidates" Page by clicking on [Reach out to engineers manually] button.
The logged-in candidate should be able to create a recruiter profile.
The candidate should be able to switch between recruiter/candidate profiles.

section.name: Candidate basic info (location / experience / salary / level)

case.title: The candidate should be able to edit the profile after clicking on [Edit profile] button.
The candidate should be able to deactivate profile in the profile settings.
The candidate should be redirected to the "Jobs" Page by clicking on the "Jobs" link in the header.
The candidate should be redirected to the "Chats" Page by clicking on the "Chats" link in the header.
The candidate should be able to connect social networks in the profile section.
The candidate should be able to change password in the profile section.
The logged-in recruiter should be able to create a candidate profile.
The recruiter should be able to switch between recruiter/candidate profiles.
The recruiter should be able to edit the profile after clicking on [Edit profile] button.
The recruiter should be able to deactivate candidate profile in the profile settings.
The recruiter should be able to connect social networks in the profile section.
The recruiter should be able to change password in the profile section.
The recruiter should be redirected to the "Candidates" Page by clicking on the "Candidates" link in the header.
The recruiter should be redirected to the "Chats" Page by clicking on the "Chats" link in the header.
The recruiter should be able to mark chats as favourite.
The recruiter should be able to archieve chats.
The recruiter should be able to send the offer to the candidate by selecting a "Hire candidate option" in the "Status" dropdown menu.
The recruiter should be able to mark the chat as rejected by selecting "Reject candidate" option in the "Status" dropdown menu.
The candidate should be able to mark chats as favourite.
The candidate should be able to archieve chats.
The candidate should be able to decline the recruiter’s proposition by clicking on [Not interested] button.
The candidate should be able to open contacts by clicking on [Share my contacts & CV] button.
The candidate should be able to enter a text message in the message input area.
The footer should contain the "TOP 100 WEB3 COMPANIES" section with a preview of the top 5 companies.
The footer should contain 3 columns of vacancies for Web3 developers.
The footer should contain a link to the LinkedIn page.
The footer should contain a link to the Twitter page.
The footer should contain a link to the Telegram page.
The footer should contain a link to the Signal page.
The footer should contain a link to the Instagram page.
The footer should contain a link to the Facebook page.
The footer should contain а link to Documents.
The footer should contain links to Pricing, FAQ, and About Us pages.
The page should contain a table with 100 Web3 companies.
The table with Web3 companies should be split into blocks of 10 companies from 10/100 to 100/100.
The page should contain skill filters.
The recruiter should be able to post a new job manually.
The recruiter should be able to import a job from ATS.
Users should be able to filter vacancies by skills.
The candidate should be able to apply for a job using 1-click apply.
The bottom of the page should contain a subscription form for vacancies.
The user should be able to enter an email in the subscription form.
The user should be able to specify desired roles in the subscription form.
The user should be able to specify experience in the subscription form.
Each company should have a clickable logo.
Clicking on a company logo should open the company vacancies page in a new tab.
Each company should have a clickable name.
The logged-out user should be suggested to sign in after clicking the [View more] button.
